response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of full-stack experience, including recent hands-on work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS. Current role involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, directly matching the AI agent development requirement. A strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, custom test frameworks, CI/CD) fits the quality-focused culture. Gaps are mostly framework-specific: no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest/Playwright experience, and much of the frontend history is Ember rather than React, but the depth and breadth suggest fast ramp-up.
strengths: 19+ years full-stack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js product work and AI-agent/MCP tooling
Strong engineering practices: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, CI/CD, and authored testing libraries
Polyglot depth (TypeScript, Java, D, C++, Swift) with cloud, Docker, and Kubernetes experience
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience, both named in the primary/secondary stack
Frontend history is Ember-heavy; React exposure appears limited to one recent role
Named testing tools (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) not explicitly listed despite strong general testing background

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
Missing Nest.js/Kotlin and limited React depth
